reason: snitt = 'average' (i snitt) is extremely common everyday Swedish, fully distinct from 'cut'
sticka carries several unrelated common senses: 'sting/prick' and colloquial 'leave/head off' are both everyday and distinct from 'knit'
'cross out, delete' (stryka ett ord) is a common distinct sense beyond stroke/iron
spänning is a genuine multi-meaning word: 'excitement/suspense' and electrical 'voltage' are both common and unrelated to physical/relational tension
synd = 'a pity, a shame' (det var synd) is extremely common colloquially and fully distinct from religious 'sin'
vind is a homonym: 'attic, loft' is a common everyday sense unrelated to 'wind'
våg = 'scale, weighing device' is a common household sense fully distinct from 'wave'
väst is a homonym: 'vest, waistcoat' is a common garment unrelated to compass direction 'west'
